programs.title: Stolen in Her Sleep
programs.desc: (2021) Psychological thriller with Morgan Bradley. A new mother's world unravels when she suspects someone is trying to steal her baby - is it real or a dangerous figment of her sleep-deprived mind?

programs.title: The Bad Twin
programs.desc: (2016) Psychological thriller starring Haylie Duff. A radio host takes in her estranged sister's teenage twins, only to discover one of them harbours a dangerous dark side...

programs.title: Triple Cross
programs.desc: (1967) WWII spy thriller with Christopher Plummer. Loosely based on a true story, bank robber Eddie Chapman gets entangled in spying for both sides during World War Two, becoming a triple agent.

programs.title: Dragon Eyes
programs.desc: (2012) Gritty action starring Cung Le and Jean-Claude Van Damme. Can a mysterious newcomer use his moral vision and fighting skills to save a neighbourhood terrorised by gangs and corrupt cops?

programs.title: Escape Plan 3
programs.desc: (2019) Action sequel with Sylvester Stallone. Ray Breslin is back behind bars in a Latvian cell-ebration of chaos - because rescuing billionaires' daughters is just part of his daily breakout routine.

programs.title: Red Sun
programs.desc: (1971) Western starring Charles Bronson and Ursula Andress. When a priceless golden sword is stolen, a rugged bodyguard and a samurai warrior join forces to take down the bandits.
